findings.description: Exception variable `e` in _get_usage_from_lcm_db is captured but never logged, making silent failures hard to debug.
findings.evidence:
except Exception as e:
        return None
findings.required_fix: Add a log.warning or print(e) inside the except block for observability; or use bare `except Exception:` if silent suppression is intentional.

findings.description: The use_lcm boolean is an intermediate variable that adds indirection without clarity benefit; the lcm_data None-check suffices.
findings.required_fix: Simplify to: `lcm_data = _get_usage_from_lcm_db(lcm_db_path) if lcm_db_path else None` then branch on `if lcm_data is not None`.

notes: No critical or major findings. docker.sock writable change is intentional (part of prior fix #161/#167). Token 40/60 split approximation is clearly documented. CI green (all 3 runs passed). kanban auto-archive logic is safe (catches datetime parse exceptions). cron last_error addition is additive and safe.
